# Groups are now Classes

We've renamed Groups to Classes to better reflect how our community uses Quizlet.

![Classroom image](/images/groups.png)

## Comments

alice_teacher: Love the rename!

bob_dev: Is the API endpoint still /groups/?

Quizlet Team: Existing Groups migrate automatically.

Groups are now Classes

Quizlet Team

We've renamed Groups to Classes to better reflect how our community uses Quizlet.

alice_teacher

Love the rename! Will existing Groups auto-migrate to Classes?

bob_dev

Is the API endpoint still /groups/ or has it moved to /classes/?

Quizlet Team

Existing Groups migrate automatically.
